message:
✨ Add token usage subcategories to track spending by feature (#606)

- Add TokenCategory type with missions, diagnose, insights, predictions, other
- Track token usage per category with TokenUsageByCategory interface
- Update addTokens() to accept optional category parameter
- Show breakdown by feature in navbar widget with token counts (523k, 1.2M format)
- Always display all features even if 0 to show what's being tracked
- Demo mode shows realistic usage distribution across categories

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
